creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mva
Date: Sun Jan 25 08:58:34 UTC 2015
New revision: 377867
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/377867

Log:
  linuxgamepublishing.com seems to be (temporarily) out of service and the
  offered game demos have been become unavailable. Mark the provided ports

    linux-candycruncher-demo
    linux-coldwar-demo
    linux-gorky17-demo
    linux-hdb-demo
    linux-majesty-demo
    linux-ningpo-demo

  as BROKEN.

  PR:		196953 196954 196955 196956 196957
  Reported by:	amdmi3

Changes:
  head/games/linux-candycruncher-demo/Makefile
  head/games/linux-coldwar-demo/Makefile
  head/games/linux-gorky17-demo/Makefile
  head/games/linux-hdb-demo/Makefile
  head/games/linux-majesty-demo/Makefile
  head/games/linux-ningpo-demo/Makefile
